Thomas Jones | Online Weight Loss & Health Coach
Thomas Jones | Online Weight Loss & Health Coach
Coaching high achievers to shed pounds and boost their health.
Coaching high achievers to shed pounds and boost their health.
Coaching high achievers to shed pounds and boost their health.

WHO AM I? I’m Tom… Since I can remember I’ve always been passionate about health, sport, and fitness. Starting in the gym as a teenager, I found that getting stronger and fitter improved every aspect of my life, making me strong, confident, and goal-driven. This passion led me to become a coach so I can help others achieve meaningful lives through strength training and optimising daily habits. I believe that regardless of how busy and stressful our lives get, we can still improve our daily habits to become a more valuable person to our loved ones, community and for our own physical and mental wellbeing. Through pursuing proper strength training, I believe that it teaches us many positive characteristics that benefit our lives such as patience, delayed gratification, goal setting, discipline and self control. The journey of self-development is one I would recommend to anyone who wants to improve their health, performance and body shape. Since 2011, I’ve worked with clients ranging from business professionals in Cardiff and exclusive members in London to VVIP clientele in Saudi Arabia. Today, I continue to help business leaders worldwide simplify their health and fitness habits for better work performance. So, if you’re here… I assume you either value the same things I do or you are looking for some guidance on how to integrate these values into your daily life. Drop me a DM if you want to know more 🫡💪🏽 Clip

SHORT ON TIME?? HERE’S A SUPER SIMPLE AND TIME EFFECTIVE TREADMILL SESSION: Warm up: - 3 minute easy jog - (some dynamic stretching eg. Leg swings, lunges, etc) Main session: (10-15% gradient) 8 rounds: - 10 second Max Hill Sprint - 50 seconds Rest #training #sprints #fitness #workout Clip

Are your stress levels 💯 but need to improve your health and drop 10-15lbs? A lot of my clients felt frustrated and overwhelmed before they started. Trying to manage their responsibilities in work and at home… It can all get a bit much. STRESS MANAGEMENT is a must if you want to optimise your health. Here are 3 simple things you can do to manage stress: 1) Frequent walks 2) Meditation 3) Improving sleep habits If you’re struggling to improve your health and lose weight due to stress…DM me the word “STRESS” for a helping hand. #health #fitness #stress Clip

We recorded a podcast which I’m excited to listen to and share also 👀 The more we learn and absorb the more valuable we become as coaches. Ultimately delivering better results for our clients. Which is the name of the game! Simple and effective training session: - Build to a heavy-ish 5 reps on back squat - Build to a heavy 5 reps on weighted dips - Barbell RDL accessory - Weighted chin up accessory #fitness #strength #training #workout #gym #coaching Clip

“I DON’T HAVE TIME TO EAT HEALTHY” “I CAN’T COOK” “I FIND IT HARD TO EAT A LOT OF PROTEIN” “[insert any bullshit excuses]” Look, I’m not a master chef… BUT It’s quite hard to f**k up a steak! Actually I take that back… When I eat out they usually always mess it up! But my point is… This literally took about 4 minutes of my time. Even less of my time to eat it and I’ll be satiated for hours… So, I know, I won’t be looking for sugary snacks within 2 hours of this meal. It’s time efficient AND if people say “RED MEAT IS BAD FOR YOU” Don’t listen to them…they are morons! #food #simplicity #health Clip
